description:
Parent epic: V3 E7: Errors, debugging, and inspection

Source task 8/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Review Kino helpers for beginner use.

Epic closure criteria:
- users can answer what happened in a turn without reading logs
- errors are normalized, readable, and safe to display
- debugging output is structured, bounded, and safe by default

comments.text: Reviewed Kino helpers for beginner use by adding Jidoka.Kino.debug_request/2, rendering prompt previews/capability call summaries, and normalizing request error previews for safe notebook display. Verified with focused Kino tests plus full format, compile, test, docs, doctor, and diff checks.

title: E7: Review Kino helpers for beginner use
